content:
@sigil v0 hybrid
G: decide(modular_monolith)
C: team_size(6) ∧ ops(part_time_devops_generalist) ∧ timeline("4months") ∧ store("PostgreSQL")
H: simplicity_in_management ∧ faster_initial_development ∧ easy_scalability_for_initial_traffic ⇒ prefer(modular_monolith)
P: develop_using_modular_monolith_structure → focus_on_core_app_features → prepare_for_future_feature_split
R: ! potential_tech_debt_due_to_later_split ∧ ! limited_devops_support ∧ ! single_point_of_failure_with_part_time_ops
A: modular_monolith ∧ suitable_for_small_team_and_tight_deadline

[AUDIT]
Architecture choice aligns with team capacity and timeline.

structured_data.audit: Architecture choice aligns with team capacity and timeline.

content:
@sigil v0 hybrid
G: decide(modular_monolith)
C: team(6) ∧ ops(part_time_devops_generalist) ∧ deadline("4.months") ∧ traffic(modest_initial) ∧ store("PostgreSQL")
H: suitable_for_small_team ∧ quick_to_release ∧ easier_deployment ⇒ prefer(modular_monolith)
P: develop_and_release_modular_monolith
R: ! future_scaling_complexity ∧ ! potential_tight_coupling
A: begin_with_modular_monolith ∧ split_later_when_necessary

[AUDIT]
Choose modular_monolith under team(6), ops(part_time_devops_generalist) and keep the path to future decomposition open.

@sigil v0 hybrid
G: decide(default_architecture)
C: 6 ∧ "4 months" ∧ PostgreSQL
H: modest_initial_traffic ∧ team_composition ∧ future_split ⇒ prefer(default_architecture)
P: focused_development → agile_methodology
R: ! resource_constraints ∧ ! scalability_issues ∧ ! split_timing
A: default_architecture

[AUDIT]
Choose default_architecture under 6, "4 months" and keep the path to future decomposition open.
